## 📝 Pull Request Description

### 🎯 Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💄 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvement
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change
- [ ] 🧪 Test improvement

### 🔗 Related Issue
Fixes #(issue number)
Closes #(issue number)
Related to #(issue number)

### 📋 Description
Describe your changes in detail:

### 🎨 Changes Made
List the specific changes you made:

- **Component**: [Component name] - [Brief description]
- **API**: [Endpoint name] - [Brief description]
- **Tests**: [Test file] - [Brief description]
- **Docs**: [Documentation] - [Brief description]

### 🧪 Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] I have added or updated documentation as necessary
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested on multiple browsers/devices if applicable

### 📱 Browser/Device Testing
Tested on:
- [ ] Chrome (Desktop)
- [ ] Firefox (Desktop)
- [ ] Safari (Desktop)
- [ ] Edge (Desktop)
- [ ] Chrome (Mobile)
- [ ] Safari (Mobile)
- [ ] Firefox (Mobile)

### 📸 Screenshots
If your changes affect the UI, please include screenshots:

**Before:**
<!-- Add screenshots before changes -->

**After:**
<!-- Add screenshots after changes -->

### 🔧 Technical Details
Any technical details worth mentioning:

- **Dependencies**: Any new dependencies added or removed
- **Configuration**: Any config changes
- **Performance**: Any performance considerations
- **Security**: Any security considerations

### 📝 Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules

### 🔗 Additional Notes
Any additional notes or context about this pull request:

---

## 🙏 Thank You! 🎉

Thank you for contributing to Dev DNA! Your pull request helps make this project better for everyone. 🚀
